## Summary

Brief description of the change.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New skill or agent
- [ ] Skill/agent update
- [ ] Schema change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build/CI

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check:plugins` passes
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] No secrets in generated files
- [ ] CONTEXT.md terms consistent (if applicable)
